CREATE TABLE geocoordinates (longitude Float64, latitude Float64);
SELECT geohashEncode(longitude, latitude, 12) AS geohash FROM geocoordinates;
SELECT geohashEncode(longitude, latitude, 1) AS geohash FROM geocoordinates WHERE longitude > -180 AND latitude < 90;
SELECT geohashEncode(longitude, latitude, 12) AS geohash FROM (SELECT -5.60302734375 AS longitude, 42.593994140625 AS latitude UNION ALL SELECT 0.0, 0.0) AS coords;
SELECT geohashEncode(longitude, latitude, 5) AS geohash FROM geocoordinates WHERE longitude BETWEEN -100 AND 100 AND latitude BETWEEN -50 AND 50;
WITH (SELECT longitude, latitude FROM geocoordinates WHERE longitude > -180 AND latitude < 90) AS valid_coords SELECT geohashEncode(longitude, latitude) AS geohash FROM valid_coords;
CREATE TABLE geohash_results AS SELECT geohashEncode(longitude, latitude, 12) AS geohash FROM geocoordinates;

SELECT g1.geohash FROM (SELECT geohashEncode(longitude, latitude) AS geohash FROM geocoordinates) AS g1 JOIN (SELECT -5.0 AS longitude, 42.0 AS latitude) AS g2 ON g1.geohash != geohashEncode(g2.longitude, g2.latitude);
SELECT geohashEncode(longitude, latitude, 13) AS geohash FROM geocoordinates;
SELECT geohashEncode(longitude, latitude, -1) AS geohash FROM geocoordinates;
SELECT geohashEncode(longitude, latitude) AS geohash FROM (SELECT -5.6 AS longitude, 42.5 AS latitude UNION DISTINCT SELECT -180 AS longitude, 90 AS latitude) AS subquery;
